To: R. Adekanmi
From: PC
Subject: Federation — this is a disaster and we have to act NOW

R —

You asked for my honest read so here it is: Federation is a catastrophe and we are about to walk the CISO into a failing milestone. I'm done waiting.

Vantage's PM has been lying in every status report for seven weeks. The Federation lead has been covering for him with this "we can still recover" nonsense and frankly I think she knows it's not true. This is unacceptable and someone senior needs to hear it immediately.

I've already drafted an email to the CISO and T. Adeyemi laying out exactly how bad this is — that Vantage is failing, that the milestone is going to blow up, and that the green reporting has been a lie. T. Adeyemi literally told me to let him know if Federation needed a push, so I'm going to take him up on it. I'll send it this afternoon and cc you so you're in the loop.

I know going to the PMO directly is a bit unusual but we are out of time and I'm not going to sit here and watch this crater while everyone is polite about it. The CISO is signing off in three weeks — she has to know the truth before then, and if we wait for the normal channels it'll be too late.

Tell me if you want me to change any of the wording but I think we need to hit this hard. The stronger the better. People need to understand this is a crisis.

PC
